prompt.content:
Referencing the PurchaseOrders document on Xero, output the total authorised purchase orders of Redwood for FY2024. In addition, output the total authorised purchase orders in FY2024 as a percentage of Fixed Assets (Net) in FY2024 in the model. 


Present monetary values in $ terms. Round all values to two decimals.

rubrics.name: States the amount of authorised purchase orders in FY2024 for Redwood is... (ver_1df560d32e6043a1b9b5d09f51f2f17e)

messages.content: States the amount of authorised purchase orders in FY2024 for Redwood is $3,410,520.66 (acceptable range $3,376,415.45 to $3,444,625.87).

rubrics.name: States the total authorised purchase orders in FY2024 as a percentage of Fixed... (ver_774c92b8a880422bb29a2401e79fe9fe)

messages.content: States the total authorised purchase orders in FY2024 as a percentage of Fixed Assets (Net) in FY 2024 for Redwood is 5.41% (acceptable range 5.36% to 5.46%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
States the amount of authorised purchase orders in FY2024 for Redwood is $3,410,520.66.

States the total authorised purchase orders in FY2024 as a percentage of Fixed Assets (Net) in FY 2024 for Redwood is 5.41%.
